release_notes: 修正 install.bat embeddable 安裝時 python._pth 被加上 BOM 導致啟動失敗
changes: 修復 install.bat 改用 embeddable zip 後,python._pth 被寫入 UTF-8 BOM,造成 python.exe 啟動時找不到 stdlib(ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'encodings')
修復在已安裝 Python 3.12.8 的電腦上 install.bat 不會建立 embedded Python 的問題(改用 embeddable zip 發行版)

en: Fix install.bat writing a UTF-8 BOM into python._pth after switching to the embeddable zip, which broke python.exe startup with 'ModuleNotFoundError: No module named encodings'
Fix install.bat failing to create the embedded Python on machines that already have Python 3.12.8 registered (switched to the embeddable zip distribution)
zh-TW: 修復 install.bat 改用 embeddable zip 後,python._pth 被寫入 UTF-8 BOM,造成 python.exe 啟動時找不到 stdlib(ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'encodings')
修復在已安裝 Python 3.12.8 的電腦上 install.bat 不會建立 embedded Python 的問題(改用 embeddable zip 發行版)
